name: Pika hotend profile delta
comment: Single source of truth for Pika-vs-stock slicer settings. Line widths are multiples of nozzle diameter. Flow caps are per-material, per-nozzle mm3/s ceilings (filament_max_volumetric_speed). Materials not listed (TPU, PC, ...) are intentionally left untouched.
flow_cap_policy: set to cap for the material/nozzle; never lower a user value that is already higher
